Data Platform Engineer

Acme Corp is hiring a Data Platform Engineer to help build and operate our petabyte-scale data platform, used by every product team in the company.

Responsibilities

Design and operate pipelines that power our petabyte-scale data platform. Work with full-time engineers across three teams to define schemas and SLAs. Support on-call rotation for critical data pipelines.

Qualifications

5+ years of experience with large-scale data systems (Spark, Kafka, or similar). Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience. Remote and hybrid candidates welcome.

What We Offer

Competitive salary and compensation package, with benefits include medical, dental, and a yearly learning stipend. Acme Corp is an equal opportunity employer.

  • Data Scientist
